techniques.name: System Information Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to get detailed information about the operating system and hardware.

techniques.name: Credentials from Password Stores
techniques.description: Adversaries may search for common password storage locations to obtain user credentials.

techniques.name: Password Managers
techniques.description: Adversaries may acquire credentials from third-party password managers.

techniques.name: Command and Scripting Interpreter
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse command and script interpreters to execute commands and scripts.

techniques.name: PowerShell
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse PowerShell commands and scripts for execution.

techniques.name: Scheduled Task/Job
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse task scheduling functionality to facilitate execution at specified intervals.

techniques.name: Scheduled Task
techniques.description: Adversaries may abuse the Windows Task Scheduler to perform task scheduling for execution.

techniques.name: Data from Local System
techniques.description: Adversaries may search local system sources to find files of interest prior to exfiltration.

techniques.name: Network Service Discovery
techniques.description: Adversaries may attempt to get a listing of services running on remote hosts and local network.
